KosmoOrbit Hauptsoftware

Role-Aware Orbit Shell

Static local prototype for role-based KosmoOrbit control surfaces.

role_shell_prototype_ready

Kosmo Demo 001

role_ui_smoke_passed · 12/12 checks

Role State

active: owner_admin

selected: owner_admin

project: kosmo-demo-001

Chef / Owner Admin full_admin · office_control
IT / KI Spezialist full_admin · infrastructure_control
Projektleiter Architekt project_control · project_decision
Entwurfsarchitekt creative_pro · design_context
Zeichner EFZ production_pro · production_quality
Praktikant guided · guided_assist
Lehrling learning · learning
Schnupperstift observer · observer
Workspace Preview

One software shell, different depth per person

Every role sees the same project state through a safer, role-shaped surface. Generation remains blocked for everyone.

Active Projectkosmo-demo-001
Visible Modules8
Blocked Actions3

Visible Modules

  • kosmo-data · available · Reference and project knowledge can be inspected locally.
  • kosmo-asset · available · Asset review evidence can be inspected locally.
  • kosmo-design · primary · Current Orbit prototype focuses on the KosmoDesign review handoff.
  • kosmo-prepare · summary_only · Prepare is visible as planned context, but not active in this demo shell.
  • kosmo-draw · summary_only · Draw handoff stays summary-only until model-quality review is closed.
  • kosmo-viz · summary_only · Viz is planned and remains blocked from generation in this state.
  • kosmo-publish · summary_only · Publish stays visible but blocked by publish and rights gates.
  • kosmo-zentrale · summary_only · Zentrale runtime is external to this static repo and only shown as status.

Blocked Actions

  • Generate Design · human-review-gate · Context and human-review gates are not approved.
  • Publish Public · publish-gate · Publish and rights gates remain blocked in the local demo.
  • Start Cloud Job · cost-gate · Cost gate is local-only and external network access is disabled.

Prototype Manifest

examples/kosmo-projects/kosmo-demo-001/orbit/role-shell-prototype.generated.html

Static HTML only. No auth runtime, no user data writes, no network calls, no Blender launch, no geometry generation, no uploads.
